title: Fat Fish
body:
## About
Ever looked at Minecraft's fish and thought they could do with a bit more... **chonk**? Probably not. Well, here we are nevertheless. "Fat Fish" does exactly what it implies, making all fish models in-game look like **absolute units**. The changes apply to **salmon**, **cod** and **tropical fish**.

Have fun exploring the oceans with your **sizable** new friends!


<details>
<summary>Required</summary>

This pack makes use of custom entity models (CEM) and requires one of the following projects:
- [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)
- [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/downloads)

</details>



---

*Made with [Blockbench](https://www.blockbench.net/)*
